title: My Bookings - Rayna Tours
meta_description: Manage your Rayna Tours bookings, download tickets, view booking details, and get support for your tours and activities.
content: My Bookings - Rayna Tours booking management system. Page URL: https://www.raynatours.com/bookings with filters for status (all, confirmed, cancelled, completed, booking_in_process) and state (upcoming, past). Booking cards show tour image, name, date, location, transfer type, guest count, status badge. Available actions: Get Help opens support for specific booking, Ticket downloads booking voucher, How was your experience allows star rating for past bookings, Driver Details viewable for confirmed bookings with transfers. Downloadable documents: Voucher, Ticket, Invoice, Cancellation confirmation. Cancelled bookings refunded to Rayna Wallet https://www.raynatours.com/wallet, wallet balance can book any new tour. For pickup requests time date location changes go to my bookings. Date change requests: Rayna does not support direct date changes, recommended approach cancel current booking refund to wallet instantly, rebook same tour new date using wallet balance. For manual assistance click Get Help on booking card.

title: Rayna Wallet - Store Credit & Refunds
meta_description: Your Rayna Tours wallet for refunds and store credit. Use wallet balance to book tours and activities.
content: Rayna Wallet system for storing refunds and credit. Cancelled bookings automatically refunded to wallet. Wallet balance can be used to book any new tour or activity. No restrictions on which tours can be booked with wallet credit. Balance never expires. Instant refund processing for cancelled bookings.

title: Booking Support & Help
meta_description: Get help with your Rayna Tours bookings. Contact support for changes, issues, and assistance.
content: Rayna Tours booking support and customer help. Multiple support options: Get Help button on booking cards for specific booking assistance, general customer support via website, phone support for urgent matters, email support for detailed inquiries. Support available for booking changes, cancellations, date modifications, pickup requests, driver details, downloadable documents assistance.
